title: T-087 — E2E: V18 built-blocker (high-risk → cannot build) (NPD-i)
prompt:
# T-087 — V18 built-blocker E2E

PRD: 01-NPD-PRD.md §18 V18 built-blocker rule
Project root: /Users/mariuszkrawczyk/Projects/monopilot-kira

## Goal
Playwright E2E + integration test verifying V18 enforcement: with one Open High-bucket risk, both single-click buildD365 and the builder wizard step 1 reject the build attempt; mitigating the risk unblocks the path.

## Implementation contract
1. apps/web/e2e/npd/v18-built-blocker.spec.ts: NPD Manager logs in → adds risk likelihood=3 impact=3 (bucket=High) → attempts buildD365 single-click → asserts error 'V18_HIGH_RISK_OPEN' + fa.built remains FALSE.
2. Same test continues: opens RiskRegisterScreen → mitigates risk with reason ≥10 chars → re-attempts buildD365 → asserts success + fa.built=TRUE.
3. Integration test apps/web/__tests__/integration/v18-trigger.test.ts: verifies DB trigger raises exception when product.built UPDATE happens with Open High risk present.

## Files
- apps/web/e2e/npd/v18-built-blocker.spec.ts [create]
- apps/web/__tests__/integration/v18-trigger.test.ts [create]
- apps/web/e2e/npd/fixtures/v18-seed.ts [create]

## Acceptance criteria
1. Given an FA with one Open High-bucket risk and built=FALSE, when buildD365 single-click is invoked, then it fails with 'V18_HIGH_RISK_OPEN' and fa.built remains FALSE per §18 V18 contract
2. Given the same scenario, when the wizard step 1 V18 check runs, then it lists the risk in blockers and the Next button is disabled per §18 V18 + §10.6.1 wizard
3. Given the risk is mitigated to state='Mitigated' (no longer Open) with reason ≥10 chars, when buildD365 is re-invoked, then it succeeds and fa.built=TRUE

## Test strategy
- RED: 3 specs above before final wiring; run against isolated test container
- Run 'pnpm --filter web test:e2e v18-built-blocker && pnpm --filter web test v18-trigger'

## Risk red lines
- Do not stub the V18 trigger — must hit real DB
- Do not run against shared/staging DB
- Do not skip post-mitigation success path

pipeline_inputs.description: Playwright E2E + integration test asserting V18 built-blocker via single-click + wizard + post-mitigation success.
pipeline_inputs.details: End-to-end exercises both build paths plus the DB trigger directly. Fixtures seed the high-risk scenario.
